use_codes.desc: LONG-TERM MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF AIRFLOW OBSTRUCTION IN PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD)
A METHOD OF USING AN AEROSOL DELIVERY DEVICE TO AEROSOLIZE GLYCOPYRROLATE FOR THE TREATMENT OF CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD)
